title: Christchurch Family Deals
meta_desc: Discover the best family deals in Christchurch, including activity discounts, campervan hire, and travel insurance, to plan an affordable and fun family holiday in July 2026
intro: Christchurch is a great destination for families, with plenty of activities and attractions to suit all ages. With some careful planning, you can have a fun and affordable family holiday in Christchurch. Here are some of the best deals and discounts available in July 2026.

sections.heading: Current Booking Deals and Discounts
sections.body:
Bookme.co.nz is offering up to 40% off activities in Christchurch, including the International Antarctic Centre and the Christchurch Gondola. Discover Cars has family campervans available from $89/day, and Booking.com has holiday parks and motels with free cancellation on most bookings.

Cover-More also offers comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day. These deals can help you save money and plan a fun and affordable family holiday in Christchurch.
list: Up to 40% off activities with Bookme.co.nz
Family campervans from $89/day with Discover Cars
Free cancellation on holiday parks and motels with Booking.com
Comprehensive family travel insurance from $4.50/day with Cover-More

sections.heading: Best-Value Activities
sections.body:
Some of the best-value activities for families in Christchurch include the International Antarctic Centre, the Christchurch Gondola, and Willowbank Wildlife Reserve. The Canterbury Museum is also completely free and has world-class natural history and Antarctic exhibitions.

The Christchurch Art Gallery is another free attraction that offers rotating exhibitions and kids' programmes. These activities are not only fun but also affordable and suitable for all ages.

sections.heading: Money-Saving Tips for Families
sections.body:
To save money on your family holiday in Christchurch, consider visiting free attractions like the Botanic Gardens and Hagley Park. You can also pack a picnic lunch instead of eating out, and look for accommodation options that offer free breakfast and parking.

Another tip is to book your activities and accommodation in advance to get the best prices. Additionally, consider visiting during the off-season or during the week instead of on weekends to avoid crowds and save money.
list: Visit free attractions like the Botanic Gardens and Hagley Park
Pack a picnic lunch instead of eating out
Look for accommodation options that offer free breakfast and parking
Book activities and accommodation in advance
Visit during the off-season or on weekdays
Use public transport or walk/bike instead of renting a car

sections.heading: When to Book for Best Prices
sections.body:
To get the best prices on activities and accommodation in Christchurch, it's recommended to book at least 2-3 weeks in advance. This can help you save up to 20% on activities and accommodation, and ensure that you get the best deals and discounts available.

Additionally, consider booking during the off-season or on weekdays to avoid crowds and save money. You can also use booking platforms like Bookme.co.nz and Booking.com to compare prices and find the best deals.
